prompt: Create a warm editorial summer portrait poster of a young woman lying diagonally on a yellow-and-white gingham picnic blanket in a sunny sunflower field. She has long dark brown-black hair, soft natural makeup, a gentle smile, and small yellow flower stickers on both cheeks, and she looks directly into the camera from a slightly overhead close-up angle. She wears a delicate white spaghetti-strap lace sundress and a wide woven straw sunhat with loose fringed edges casting dappled light across her face. She holds a black mirrorless camera with a large lens in both hands near her chest. Include exactly 7 main visible prop/scene elements: 1 straw sunhat, 1 black camera, 1 yellow-and-white gingham blanket, 1 yellow rectangular picnic bag or book at left, 1 green leafy vegetable or bouquet leaf near the lower left, 1 small cluster of orange-yellow flowers near the bottom, and 2 visible sunflowers in the background grass. Use bright midday summer sunlight, lush green grass, soft golden highlights, shallow depth of field, airy romantic lifestyle photography, natural skin texture, dreamy but realistic colors. Add magazine-style typography: large white italic serif headline at the upper left reading SUMMER BLOOM, with three small white lines beneath reading Live in the sunshine / Dream in the flowers / Grow with joy. Add a handwritten yellow signature-style phrase at the lower right reading sun-lit days with a tiny simple flower doodle. Vertical 4:5 composition, high-resolution fashion picnic aesthetic, no extra people, no watermark, no distorted hands or camera.

promptZh: 创作一张温暖的夏日时尚人像海报，主角是 一位年轻女性，她斜躺在阳光明媚的向日葵花田里的黄白格纹野餐垫上。她留着深棕黑色长发，妆容自然柔和，面带温柔微笑，双颊贴有黄色小花贴纸，以略微俯视的特写角度直视镜头。她身穿精致的白色吊带蕾丝夏裙，戴着一顶边缘有松散流苏的宽檐草帽，斑驳的光影洒在脸上。她双手将一台带有大镜头的黑色无反相机抱在胸前。画面中需包含 7 个主要的可见道具/场景元素：1 顶草帽、1 台黑色相机、1 张黄白格纹野餐垫、左侧 1 个黄色长方形野餐包或书本、左下角 1 片绿色叶菜或花束叶片、底部 1 小簇橙黄色花朵，以及背景草地中可见的 2 朵向日葵。运用明亮的夏日正午阳光，背景为郁郁葱葱的绿草，带有柔和的金色高光，浅景深效果，营造空气感浪漫生活摄影风格，保留自然的皮肤质感，色彩梦幻且真实。添加杂志风格排版：左上角为大号白色斜体衬线标题 SUMMER BLOOM，下方配有三行小字 Live in the sunshine / Dream in the flowers / Grow with joy。右下角添加手写风格的黄色短语 sun-lit days，并配有一个简单的花朵涂鸦。竖版 4:5 构图，高分辨率时尚野餐美学，画面中无其他人物，无水印，无扭曲的手部或相机。
